title: CatBoost correction weight 0.05
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.05 against the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the final CatBoost blend weight to 0.05: final = 0.95 * realmlp_core + 0.05 * catboost_pred. Preserve folds and CatBoost parameters.
expected_effect: Find a safe low CatBoost weight between shrinkage and the stronger parent correction.
risk: The weight may underuse CatBoost if the parent used a larger successful correction.
